1.arabic: طَهَ النَّبِی العَدْنَان مَنْ جَآءَ بِالقُرآن

2.arabic: عَيْنِی وَسُؤْلِی وَکُلُّ شُغْلِی بِهِ مَدَی الأزْمَان
2.latin: ‘Ainî wasû,lî wa kullu syughlî bihi madâl azmân

4.arabic: مَا دَامَ عَبْدُ الغَنِیِّ يَشْدُو بِهِ مَدَی الأَزْمَان
4.latin: Mâ dâma ‘abdul ghoniyyi yasydû bihi madâl azmân

text.1: Toha nabi keturunan Adnan, seorang yang datang membawa al-Quran
text.2: Mataku, permintaanku, dan setiap kesibuanku untuk beliau selamanya
text.3: Berselawatlah kepada nabi dan semua keluarga
text.4: Selama Abdul Ghoni memuji beliau selamanya

en.name: Thaha the Prophet, Descendant of Adnan

text.1: Thaha the Prophet, descendant of Adnan, the one who came with the Quran
text.2: My eyes, my desires, and all my preoccupations are upon him for all of time
text.3: Send blessings upon the Prophet and his entire family
text.4: As long as Abdul Ghani sings his praises throughout the ages
